education.degree: Bachelor of Technology in Computer Science & Engineering
education.institution: Indira Gandhi Institute of Technology (IGIT), Sarang

bullets: Designed and delivered a multi-layer analytics engine for a Canada-based fintech client, structuring REST endpoints with consistent response contracts and caching layers to reduce redundant server load.

Built a modular Single Page Application in React and Node.js with a strict separation of concerns between data layer, state management, and view components, making the codebase independently testable at each layer.
Implemented a non-blocking UI rendering loop using requestAnimationFrame to avoid frame drops when visualizing dense datasets (deep data maps, prediction envelopes) during live data updates.
Managed international async project milestones, contract SLAs, and independent code deployment workflows on Render and Docker environments.

ai_ml.focus: Automated Agentic Workflows, NLP Pipelines, and LLM Orchestration

projects.name: youtube-bot
projects.description: Fully autonomous YouTube Shorts automation bot powered by AI, running daily on GitHub Actions to discover, crop (16:9 to 9:16), transcribe (Whisper), and upload game clips with dynamically generated voiceovers and subtitles.

projects.name: BharatLex
projects.description: High-utility contract analysis and drafting web application for Indian MSMEs that uses LLMs to parse agreements, flag high-risk clauses, and generate summaries and drafts.

projects.name: brain-tumor-detector
projects.description: Deep learning brain tumor MRI scan classifier built using an optimized multi-layer CNN architecture that reduced parameters by 93% to prevent overfitting and ensure high training stability.

projects.name: Knowledge-Synthesizer
projects.description: NLP pipeline that transforms raw discussions into real-time semantic knowledge graphs via entity extraction and concept relationship inference.

projects.name: discord-ai
projects.description: Autonomous AI agent with a dynamic mood-state engine, persistent user memory via entity extraction, and behavioral pacing — deployed with Docker + PM2.

projects.name: personal-butler
projects.description: AI Desktop Agent featuring episodic memory, local RAG pipeline, and a cognitive emotion framework (OCC/PAD model).

projects.name: calling-system
projects.description: Integrated VoIP automation system handling intelligent call routing and real-time voice AI agents via Twilio.

projects.name: crypto-bot / insta-bot
projects.description: Automated Threads/Instagram publishing bots generating daily crypto analytics content and synthetic AI images.

certifications.name: Certificate of Participation: AI for Students - Build Your Own Generative AI Model

cybersecurity.focus: Autonomous Security Auditing and Static Analysis

projects.name: xtrace-sdk
projects.description: Distributed tracing SDK utilizing context propagation (HTTP headers) and async event hooks to collect trace spans from remote services, forwarding structured trace logs to a centralized collector.

robotics.focus: Computer Vision Interfaces and Human-Machine Interaction

projects.name: solar-system-using-hand-gesture
projects.description: Real-time hand gesture control of a WebGL solar system — MediaPipe computer vision fused with Three.js orbital physics at 30fps.

projects.name: Face-recognition
projects.description: Privacy-first face recognition running 100% client-side via TensorFlow.js — zero biometric data leaves the browser.

fullstack.focus: Full-Stack Web Applications and Systems Engineering

projects.name: Trade
projects.description: Algorithmic trading engine with automated breakout detection, volatility filtering, and fee-aware risk management.

projects.name: RULE-THE-WORLD
projects.description: Geopolitical & macroeconomic simulator built on a custom modular JS engine — zero framework dependencies, real-time diplomatic state machines.
